reference: I have suffered from a bad back since the age of fourteen. I am now only twenty and I am finding it difficult to do day-to-day activities. No doctor takes it seriously, and I know there must be something wrong or a reason why my back is hurting so much. What can I do?
text: I have suffered from a bad back since the age of fourteen. I am now twenty, and I'm finding it difficult to do day-to-day activities. No doctor takes it seriously, and I know there must be something wrong or a reason why my back is hurting so much. What can I do?
